prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-INCREDIBLES-LIP-GLOSS-TIN-IN0001SA Product Type: LIP_COLOR Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Disney Incredibles Collectible Family Super of Heroes Lip Gloss Tin Set Description: Featuring the characters from your favorite Disney crime-fighting family, Violette, Frozone, Jack Jack, Elastigirl, Dash and Mr. Incredible, this lip gloss set with collectible tin carrier includes three character lip gloss flavors: Cotton Candy for Dash, Grape for Elastigirl and Bubble Gum for Mr. Incredible.

The fun and collective carry tin fits all three of the lip gloss flavors, so you easily can pack them up with you for family trips or send them with your little ones to school. The tin is also multipurpose, as it can be used to travel or store other of your little ones' treasured or special goodies.

All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed and 100% authentic for worldwide distribution. Search Terms: Incredibles Lip Gloss Tin lipgloss makeup beauty collectible disney Violette Frozone Jack Elastigirl Dash Mr. Incredible stocking stuffer kids fun stuffers children toddler christmas gift Hanukah gifts Features: - SHIMMER AND SHINE This super cool unique lip gloss set makes lips sparkle and shine, while hydrating and protecting, plus it features everyone's favorite Disney crime-fighting family: The Incredibles! - COOL COLLECTIVE TRAVEL STORAGE TIN: The decorative tin and each of the lip glosses are decorated with different Disney The Incredibles characters like features Violet, Elastigirl, Dash and of course, Mr. Incredible! Kids will have a blast toting and showing their friends this colorful collection of lip gloss - PUCKER UP WITH YUMMY FLAVORS: Children will have a great time trying out all the amazing flavors and there is sure to be something for everyone! The flavors include: Bubble Gum, Grape and Cotton Candy Three Sparkly Flavors: Cotton Candy, Grape, and Bubble Gum - GREAT STOCKING STUFFER: Great as a party favor, gift, stocking stuffer, swag bag, conference bag, goodie bag, Easter basket filler, Christmas gift, convention swag bag item or holiday gift - AGES 3 AND UP: This kit of lip balms is recommended for children ages 3 and up. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Disney Incredibles Lip Gloss Tin Set

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products Disney Incredibles Lip Gloss Tin Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 3-Piece Set, Collectible Tin, Cotton Candy And Grape And Bubble Gum Flavors, Ages 3 Plus

openai.title_differentiation: 3 Sparkly Flavors, Collectible Character Tin, Travel Storage, Ages 3, Great For Gifts, Fun Party Favors
